description: Build complete Tiny Wins V5 HTML app with all enhancements

featuresImplemented: Random task selection (10 random from 50 per category)
7 growth stages: Seedling → Sprout → Plant → Sapling → Tree → Oak → Grove
Shuffle button for new random tasks

v5Enhancements.randomSelection: Shows 10 random tasks from 50 per category
v5Enhancements.growthSystem: Visual plant/tree progression based on total wins
